{{CargoRelic
|name=Spinning Jenny
|rank=Blue
|affct=TECH
|birthday=06-12
|source=Lottery Machine (0.36%), Wishing (13.2%), Tool Chest (2%), Novice Scroll (5%)
|description=On Jun 12, 1764, James Hargreaves invented a new spinning machine with eight vertical spindles.

Looking at the spinning machine that toppled on the ground, he wondered if it could rotate 8 spindles if they were put vertically instead. That was how he increased the efficiency of a loom by eight times. This invention changed the industrial development. 

[Development]

5 years later, the hydraulic spinning machine was invented. 10 years later, the worsted spinning machine was invented. 40 later, steam was widely used in spinning machines.
|fame=30
|art=24
|fth=29
|civ=25
|tech=46
|ss1=Per Exploration completed, Snail ATK +2<br>Explorations completed 20/20
|ss2=Per Exploration completed, Snail ATK +4<br>Explorations completed 20/20
|ss3=Per Exploration completed, Snail ATK +6<br>Explorations completed 20/20
|ss4=Per Exploration completed, Snail ATK +10<br>Explorations completed 20/20
|ss7=Per Exploration completed, Snail ATK +10<br>Explorations completed 20/20<br>Snail ATK +50 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill I.png|50px]] Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, TECH Checks -5
}}

[[Category:Relics]]
[[Category:Blue Relics]]
[[Category:TECH Relics]]
[[Category:Blue TECH Relics]]
[[Category:ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Lumber Camp Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:TECH Boost]]
[[Category:Lottery Bead Color Change]]
[[Category:Ancient Fossil Boost]]
